tool_args.label: Minutes of the Meeting of the Committee of the Whole - November 18, 2024

payload.title: Minutes of the Meeting of the Committee of the Whole, comprised of the New York City Transit Authority and MTA Bus Committee, the Joint Long Island Rail Road Committee and Metro-North Commuter Railroad Committee, the Capital Program Committee, the Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Committee, the Finance Committee, and the Safety Committee

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Rockaway A/S Line Resiliency and Rehabilitation (Hammels Y)

payload.project_name: Rockaway A/S Line Resiliency and Rehabilitation
payload.description: Full reconstruction of the 65-year-old Hammels Y connecting Jamaica Bay to the viaduct across the Rockaways peninsula, and rehabilitation of systems on the South Channel Bridge. Requires full service closure starting January for 16 weeks.
Full design beginning; RFP released for preliminary engineering team. NYC's first light rail line, will serve more than 100,000 daily riders and connect neighborhoods in Brooklyn and Queens.
Making the three-station 14th St 1/2/3/F/M/L complex fully ADA accessible. Completed mezzanine to platform elevator on the Uptown side of the 1/2/3, following other elevator openings this summer.

tool_args.label: NYCT October 2024 subway rides - nearly 114 million
tool_args.raw_text: October was the busiest month for NYCT since the pandemic, with nearly 114 million subway rides and over 40 million bus rides.

tool_args.label: NYCT October 2024 bus rides - over 40 million
tool_args.raw_text: October was the busiest month for NYCT since the pandemic, with nearly 114 million subway rides and over 40 million bus rides.

tool_args.label: LIRR October 2024 total ridership - 7.2 million
tool_args.raw_text: Total ridership for the month of October was 7.2 million customers, which represents 88.2% of October 2019 ridership.

tool_args.label: LIRR October 2024 OTP - 95.95%
tool_args.raw_text: in October, on-time-performance ("OTP") was 95.95%, above the goal of 94%

tool_args.label: Metro-North October 2024 total ridership - 6.5 million
tool_args.raw_text: October was a strong month for Metro-North ridership, with a total of 6.5 million riders, an increase of 13% from September and a 16.2% increase from October 2023.

tool_args.label: Metro-North October 2024 systemwide OTP - 98.5%
tool_args.raw_text: Systemwide OTP for October was 98.5%, above goal of 94%

tool_args.label: TBTA toll revenue year-to-date up 5.5%
tool_args.raw_text: Toll revenue year-to-date is up 5.5% compared to the same period last year.

tool_args.label: TBTA overall revenue recovery 63% through October
tool_args.raw_text: Overall revenue recovery from all forms of collection is 63% through October.

tool_args.label: NYCT October subway customer journey performance time 84.8%
tool_args.raw_text: On subways, customer journey performance time was 84.8% and service delivered was 95.2%.

tool_args.label: NYCT October bus service delivered 95.8%
tool_args.raw_text: On buses, NYCT saw similar progress in availability and service delivered (95.8%).

tool_args.label: LIRR Grand Central Madison October 2024 ridership - 1.72 million
tool_args.raw_text: The total monthly ridership to Grand Central Madison hit another record with almost 1.72 million customers, based on load weight.

tool_args.label: Metro-North October 2024 avg weekday ridership - 230,449
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's average weekday ridership of 230,449 is a post-pandemic record, at 79.2% of pre-COVID levels in October 2019.

tool_args.label: TBTA collisions down more than 16% vs 2023
tool_args.raw_text: collisions are down more than 16% for the same period vs. 2023

tool_args.raw_text: upcoming 60th anniversary on November 21st of the opening of the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge

tool_args.label: Metro-North Siemens SC-42 Charger Locomotive Unveiling
tool_args.raw_text: On Friday, November 1, Metro-North unveiled the first two of the new Siemens SC-42 Charger locomotives at Harmon Shop.

payload.description: Metro-North unveiled the first two new Siemens SC-42 Charger locomotives at Harmon Shop, ahead of schedule and within budget

tool_args.label: Runwise pilot program fuel savings
tool_args.raw_text: The pilot program resulted in a reduction in fuel consumption across the MTA locations where this software was implemented.

payload.claim_text: The pilot program resulted in a reduction in fuel consumption across the MTA locations where this software was implemented. The MTA collected data on fuel savings for seven locations for 2–3 months of the heating season, finding $139,000 in savings over the previous year, which if extrapolated over the heating season, would be $411,000.
payload.subject: Runwise boiler management software

tool_args.label: Jamie Torres-Springer President of MTA C&D
MTA C&D implementing ADA upgrades and 14th Street complex work

payload.description: C&D completed mezzanine to platform elevator on the Uptown side of the 1/2/3 at 14th St complex, part of ADA accessibility upgrades

tool_args.label: MTA C&D implementing Rockaway A/S Line resiliency project

payload.description: C&D performing resiliency and rehabilitation work on the A and S lines, reconstructing Hammels Y, rehabilitating South Channel Bridge systems

tool_args.label: MTA C&D advancing Interborough Express design

payload.description: C&D fully designing the Interborough Express and released RFP for preliminary engineering team
